chunks.title: Resume Summary
chunks.text: Cloud architect and cybersecurity leader with 20+ years across DoD and enterprise environments. I design secure cloud platforms, build DevSecOps pipelines, and lead modernization efforts for mission-critical systems in regulated IL4/IL5/IL6 contexts.

chunks.title: Azure Architecture and Engineering Manager
chunks.company: Leidos - USAF Cloud One ACSS Program
chunks.text: Azure Architecture and Engineering Manager at Leidos - USAF Cloud One ACSS Program. Location: Remote (US). Dates: 2026-03 to Present. Clearance: Secret. IL levels: IL4, IL5, IL6. Tags: Cloud Architecture, Engineering Leadership, DevSecOps, Zero Trust. Technologies: Azure, AWS, Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, Kubernetes, Git. Highlights: Lead Azure architecture and engineering for the USAF Cloud One Architecture and Common Shared Services (ACSS) multi-cloud environment spanning Azure, AWS, Google, and Oracle. Manage and mentor a cloud engineering team delivering secure, cloud-native shared services across IL4/IL5/IL6 workloads. Drive DevSecOps, infrastructure as code, and zero-trust architecture to advance USAF system resiliency, security, and cost effectiveness.

chunks.title: Azure Architecture and Engineering Manager
chunks.company: Leidos - USAF Cloud One ACSS Program
chunks.text: Lead the Azure architecture and engineering practice for the U.S. Air Force Cloud One Architecture and Common Shared Services (ACSS) program, a global-scale, multi-cloud modernization effort supporting mission-critical Department of the Air Force workloads. Combines hands-on cloud architecture with engineering management, coordinating Azure delivery alongside AWS, Google, and Oracle across the program.

chunks.title: Azure Architecture and Engineering Manager
chunks.company: Leidos - USAF Cloud One ACSS Program
chunks.text:
Design scalable, resilient, and secure Azure architectures and reference patterns for the Cloud One multi-cloud environment.
Manage, mentor, and supervise a team of cloud engineers, guiding cloud-native application design, deployment, and complex technical decisions.
Drive adoption of DevSecOps practices, infrastructure as code, and automation using Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, and Kubernetes.
Architect secure cloud solutions implementing zero-trust principles and defense-in-depth across IL4/IL5/IL6 boundaries.
Manage Azure networking, VPNs, IaaS, PaaS, identity (Azure AD/SAML), and data services supporting shared-services delivery.
Partner with stakeholders to translate mission requirements into technical solutions and present architectural recommendations to program leadership.

chunks.title: Azure Architecture and Engineering Manager
chunks.company: Leidos - USAF Cloud One ACSS Program
chunks.text: Advancing standardized, secure Azure reference architectures and DevSecOps automation across the Cloud One environment to strengthen USAF system resiliency, security, and cost effectiveness.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead at SAIC - Cloud One Program. Location: Remote (Alabama, US). Dates: 2023-01 to 2026-02. Clearance: Secret. IL levels: IL4, IL5, IL6. Tags: RMF, ATO, DevSecOps. Technologies: Azure, AWS, OCI, Terraform, Jenkins, GitHub, Nessus. Highlights: Improved vulnerability response and automation across hybrid cloud workloads. Reduced ATO friction through reusable inheritance and control documentation. Strengthened audit readiness for mission-critical USAF and Army applications.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text: Served as senior cybersecurity engineer for the Cloud One Common Computing Environment, supporting globally distributed hybrid cloud environments hosting critical DoD workloads.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text:
Led vulnerability triage and remediation planning across virtualized, containerized, and cloud-native systems.
Produced SAP, SAR, and POA&M artifacts supporting RMF and authorization workflows.
Implemented and validated controls aligned to NIST 800-53, SRGs, STIGs, and DoD 8500/8510 guidance.
Integrated security checks into CI/CD pipelines and advised system owners through RMF lifecycle sustainment.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text: Established repeatable security inheritance patterns and improved compliance velocity while sustaining operational security across IL4/IL5/IL6 systems.

chunks.title: Cloud Architect
chunks.text: Cloud Architect at SAIC - USCENTCOM J6. Location: MacDill AFB, Tampa, FL. Dates: 2022-01 to 2023-12. Clearance: Secret. IL levels: IL5, IL6. Tags: Cloud Architecture, IaC, DevSecOps. Technologies: Azure Government, Terraform, ARM, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Synapse. Highlights: Delivered USCENTCOM's first cloud-native IL5/IL6 deployments. Created reusable IaC frameworks to reduce provisioning time and drift. Established secure DevSecOps pipeline patterns across teams.

chunks.title: Cloud Architect
chunks.text: Led architecture for CENTCOM cloud modernization and initial Azure Government IL5/IL6 adoption, balancing mission delivery with strict security and compliance requirements.

chunks.title: Cloud Architect
chunks.text:
Designed secure enterprise cloud landing zones aligned to SRG, RMF, and SCCA requirements.
Architected DevSecOps workflows and standardized infrastructure templates.
Designed lakehouse analytics patterns with Azure Synapse and medallion architecture.
Produced technical trade studies and migration recommendations for mission owners.

chunks.title: Cloud Architect
chunks.text: Enabled CENTCOM's first scalable cloud architecture baseline with consistent governance, faster delivery, and improved mission analytics enablement.

chunks.title: Innovations Engineer, Cloud and Modernization
chunks.company: SAIC - USCENTCOM J6 Technology Innovation Branch
chunks.text: Innovations Engineer, Cloud and Modernization at SAIC - USCENTCOM J6 Technology Innovation Branch. Location: MacDill AFB, Tampa, FL. Dates: 2020-01 to 2022-12. Clearance: Secret. IL levels: IL5, IL6. Tags: Modernization, Enterprise Architecture, Technical Analysis. Technologies: Azure Gov, Terraform, RMF, SRG, SCCA. Highlights: Influenced modernization decisions across HQ and theater operations. Accelerated secure cloud adoption through governance-aligned engineering. Improved interoperability planning for coalition and partner networks.

chunks.title: Innovations Engineer, Cloud and Modernization
chunks.company: SAIC - USCENTCOM J6 Technology Innovation Branch
chunks.text: Advised CENTCOM J6 modernization initiatives by evaluating emerging technologies and mapping them to secure, interoperable adoption paths.

chunks.text:

chunks.title: Innovations Engineer, Cloud and Modernization
chunks.company: SAIC - USCENTCOM J6 Technology Innovation Branch
chunks.text: Helped define a practical modernization roadmap that advanced cloud adoption while meeting security, interoperability, and mission constraints.

chunks.title: Senior Cyber Infrastructure Analyst
chunks.text: Senior Cyber Infrastructure Analyst at SAIC - USCENTCOM. Location: MacDill AFB, Tampa, FL. Dates: 2017-01 to 2020-12. Clearance: Secret. IL levels: IL2. Tags: Cyber Defense, Boundary Security, Network Engineering. Technologies: Firewalls, IDS/IPS, Azure Gov, Nexus, ASA, JRSS. Highlights: Strengthened defensive posture across HQ and theater environments. Built an IL2 cyber test range for rapid engineering validation. Improved uptime through Tier 2/3 troubleshooting and architecture tuning.

chunks.title: Senior Cyber Infrastructure Analyst
chunks.text: Designed and sustained cybersecurity boundary infrastructure for USCENTCOM headquarters and operational theater networks.

chunks.title: Senior Cyber Infrastructure Analyst
chunks.text:
Engineered and maintained firewalls, IDS/IPS, and filtering infrastructure.

Built an automated cyber range in Azure Gov IL2 for experimentation.

chunks.title: Senior Cyber Infrastructure Analyst
chunks.text: Improved resilience, compliance, and testing velocity for cyber defense capabilities supporting mission operations.

chunks.title: Network Operations SME, Senior

chunks.text: Network Operations SME, Senior at CACI / L3 NSS - USAF Southwest Asia AOR. Location: Shaw AFB, Sumter, SC. Dates: 2011-01 to 2017-12. Clearance: Secret. IL levels: NIPR, SIPR. Tags: Network Operations, Routing, Data Center. Technologies: Cisco 7600, Catalyst 6500, Nexus, ASA, MPLS, BGP, OSPF. Highlights: Sustained high availability across 17 bases supporting 10,000+ users. Improved backbone performance and routing reliability. Strengthened AAA and firewall resilience across the enterprise.

chunks.title: 0651 Data Network Specialist

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text: Serve as the senior cybersecurity engineer supporting the Cloud One Common Computing Environment—a globally distributed hybrid DoD cloud hosting mission-critical USAF and Army applications. Lead vulnerability management, RMF compliance, continuous monitoring, ATO sustainment, and DevSecOps security integration for multi-cloud IL4/IL5/IL6 systems.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text:
Perform vulnerability identification, triage, and remediation planning across virtualized, containerized, and cloud-native workloads.
Develop SAP, SAR, and POA&M documentation supporting A&A processes.
Document inheritable cloud and platform security controls per DoD 8500.01, 8510.01, NIST 800-53, SRGs, and STIGs.
Conduct security testing, configuration assessments, and gap analysis.
Ensure logging, auditing, PKI enforcement, and CSSP integration across applications.
Implement RMF controls and continuous monitoring artifacts.
Integrate security automation into CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub, Azure DevOps).
Provide expert remediation recommendations for audit findings.
Guide system owners through RMF steps 1–6 and ongoing authorization.
Present security findings and recommendations to leadership.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text:
Strengthened cybersecurity posture of Cloud One across hybrid environments.
Improved audit readiness and reduced ATO friction through high-quality documentation.
Enhanced vulnerability response processes and security automation.
Established reusable inheritance documentation for cloud control families.

chunks.title: Senior Cloud Cyber Security Engineer - Lead
chunks.text: ACAS, HBSS, eMASS, Nessus, RMF, NIST 800-53, SRG/STIG, CIS Benchmarks, Azure, AWS, OCI, Terraform, Jenkins, GitHub, Python, Bash, PowerShell.

Architected DevSecOps ecosystems using GitHub and Azure DevOps.
Designed Data Lakehouse solutions using Azure Synapse and medallion architecture.
Built Terraform/ARM IaC modules for standardized IL5/IL6 deployments.
Designed identity, networking, segmentation, and cloud boundary configurations.
Produced engineering analyses, trade studies, and modernization recommendations.
Supported ATO artifacts and secure workload migration processes.

chunks.title: Cloud Architect

Delivered USCENTCOM’s first cloud-native IL5/IL6 deployments.
Established DevSecOps culture and automated pipelines across teams.
Created reusable IaC frameworks reducing provisioning time and drift.
Enabled new data analytics capabilities through lakehouse architecture.

chunks.title: Cloud Architect
chunks.text: Azure Government IL5/IL6, Terraform, ARM, GitHub, Azure DevOps, Azure Synapse, VNet design, identity integrations, RMF, SRG/SCCA governance.
